title: polemonium delicatum subsp. scopulinum
intro: Polemonium delicatum subsp. scopulinum, also known as Sky Pilot, is a perennial flowering plant native to the mountainous regions of the western United States. Traditionally used in herbal medicine, the plant's leaves and flowers contain flavonoids and phenolic acids, which are believed to possess anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The medicinal properties of Polemonium delicatum subsp. scopulinum have been associated with various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving respiratory health, and boosting the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as teas and infusions, can be made by drying the leaves and flowers, although its use should be approached with caution due to potential interactions with medications.
